svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 520px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(224, 242, 241), rgb(20, 36, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 150, 136), rgb(36, 165, 153));

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Movie- _movie_id: str
- _title: str
- _genre: Genre
- _duration: int
- _language: str
- _rating: float+ movie_id (property)
+ title (property)
+ duration (property)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(76, 175, 80), rgb(50, 135, 54));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 145px; margin-left: 471px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Seat- _seat_id: str
- _row: str
- _number: int
- _category: str
- _status: SeatStatus+ seat_id (property)
+ category (property)
+ status (property/setter)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(76, 175, 80), rgb(50, 135, 54));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 345px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Screen- _screen_id: str
- _name: str
- _seats: Dict[str, Seat]+ add_seat(seat)
+ get_seat(id) → Optional[Seat]
+ get_all_seats() → List[Seat]
+ get_available_seats() → List[Seat]

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(232, 245, 233), rgb(21, 33, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(76, 175, 80), rgb(50, 135, 54));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 550px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Theatre- _theatre_id: str
- _name: str
- _city: City
- _address: str
- _screens: Dict[str, Screen]+ add_screen(screen)
+ get_screen(id) → Optional[Screen]
+ name (property)
+ city (property)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(200, 230, 201), rgb(28, 54, 29)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 142, 60), rgb(83, 157, 86));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 780px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Show- _show_id: str
- _movie: Movie
- _screen: Screen
- _theatre: Theatre
- _start_time: datetime
- _end_time: datetime
- _pricing: Dict[str, float]+ get_price(category) → float
+ set_pricing(category, price)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(251, 192, 45), rgb(120, 69, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 465px; margin-left: 511px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.i: + calculate_price(base: float, show: Show, category: str) → float

PeakPricing- peak_hours: Set[int]
- surcharge: float+ calculate_price(base, show, category) → float

div.div: WeekendPricing- weekend_surcharge: float+ calculate_price(base, show, category) → float

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(243, 229, 245), rgb(45, 33, 47)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(156, 39, 176), rgb(245, 144, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 815px; margin-left: 471px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Booking- _booking_id: str
- _show: Show
- _user_id: str
- _seats: List[Seat]
- _total_amount: float
- _status: BookingStatus
- _created_at: datetime
- _lock: Lock+ confirm()
+ cancel()
+ total_amount (property)
+ status (property)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(227, 242, 253), rgb(20, 33, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(33, 150, 243), rgb(38, 139, 219));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1045px; margin-left: 471px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
BookingManager
(Singleton)- _bookings: Dict[str, Booking]
- _pricing_strategy: PricingStrategy
- _lock: Lock+ create_booking(show, user, seats) → Booking
+ confirm_booking(id) → Booking
+ cancel_booking(id) → Booking
+ get_booking(id) → Optional[Booking]

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(252, 228, 236), rgb(52, 31, 38)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(233, 30, 99), rgb(255, 128, 187));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1045px; margin-left: 221px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
MovieSearchService- _movies: Dict[str, Movie]
- _shows: Dict[str, Show]+ search_by_city(city) → List[Show]
+ search_by_movie(id) → List[Show]
+ search_by_genre(genre, city?) → List[Show]
+ search_by_date(date, city?) → List[Show]
+ get_available_seats(show_id) → List[Seat]

div.div:
Legend
━━━ Solid: Composition / Inheritance
- - - Dashed: Association / Reference
Patterns Used:
• Strategy (PricingStrategy)
• Singleton (BookingManager)
• State (Seat/Booking status)
• Facade (MovieSearchService)
• SRP across all classes
